<?php namespace Illuminate\Support; class HigherOrderTapProxy { /** * The target being tapped. * * @var mixed */ public $target; /** * Create a new tap proxy instance. * * @param mixed $target */ public function __construct($target) { $this->target = $target; } /** * Dynamically pass method calls to the target. * * @param string $method * @param array $parameters * @return mixed */ public function __call($method, $parameters) { $this->target->{$method}(...$parameters); return $this->target; } }
